creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I am just reporting that I also got this crash in VM in virtual box with 
the current version 5.2.1.1588_1,3 with the same stack.
However, version 6.1.0.5001,1 that was up in the repository briefly in 
January still works very well on my desktop with NVidia 9400 GT card.
I updated the port to that January 18th version but it doesn't build any 
more. File size mismatch. Sadly they don't keep the rpms or .bin by 
version. Or do they?
Looks like the current version up on their website is 6.0.0.1735-1. So 
they have withdrawn 6.1.0.5001 for some reason.

Yuri
